name: Learning to Detect Cross-Modal Negation: An Analysis of Latent Representations and an Attention-Based Solution
summary: arXiv:2607.17712v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Detecting high-level semantic concepts like negation across modalities remains a challenge for current multimodal systems. We analyze this as a funda...
description: arXiv:2607.17712v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Detecting high-level semantic concepts like negation across modalities remains a challenge for current multimodal systems. We analyze this as a fundamental representation learning problem, providing the first evidence that negation does not form a linearly or non-linearly separable class in the latent spaces of standard vision-language models (VLM...
author: Ali AbuSaleh, Leon Hammerla, Alexander Mehler
